120\069\061\061","\122\067\048\104\085\114\112\072\073\088\081\070\121\117\061\061";"\087\055\113\067\110\075\052\082\105\075\086\115\070\117\061\061","\103\103\066\101";"\105\100\055\120\108\111\055\107\069\111\118\065";"\070\076\065\117","\083\079\057\113\068\053\113\090\070\109\121\109\054\109\043\108\100\102\084\073\052\087\061\061","\113\097\047\097\118\114\078\072\050\076\100\066\066\087\061\061","\116\049\076\087\078\072\061\061"}local function T(T)return s[T-(103669-60156)]end for T,h in ipairs({{452848+-452847,484273-483487},{-326697-(-326698);844325+-843702},{-815479+816103;-846280+847066}})do while h[-435534-(-435535)]<h[700972+-700970]do do local return(function(s,c,g,t,j,y,P,I,J,D,B,z,W,F,n,m,V,l,R,H,q,S,A,h)A,H,I,n,h,W,m,B,J,F,V,z,D,S,l,R,q=function(s,T)local c=q(T)local g=function(g)return h(s,{g},T,c)end return g
